name: 03 — Source Health Check & Failure Alerting (Every 6 Hours)
_comment: Every 6 hours, fetch source health from the API and fire source_failure webhook events for any sources with failures or noisy warnings. Connect source_failure webhook to email notification via Zapier.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'source_failure', payload: { sourceId: $json.id, sourceName: $json.name, lastStatus: $json.last_status, totalFailures: $json.total_failures, noisyWarning: $json.noisy_warning, lastRun: $json.last_run } }) }}
